body:
small bugfix for which `discrete_form=form` and `Fields` were not working for tracers.

Also passing all the fields to the forcing function instead of only the prognostic ones

labels.description: Even a perfect program still has bugs
labels.name: bug 🐞

title: Bugfix for `DiscreteDiffusionFunction` + passes prognostic + auxiliary fields to forcing functions

body:
with the current scheme tapering was not applied correctly and slopes would increase until blowing up (and there was a very devious bug in the `SmallSlopeIsopycnalTensor` constructor). 
This PR fixes it. 

A one degree lat-lon simulation with GM (k_skew=1000, k_symmetric=900) is incoming...

labels.description: Even a perfect program still has bugs
labels.name: bug 🐞

title: Fixes to Gent McWilliams parametrization
